tagline: Your Property Won't Wait. Neither Will We.
hero_subtitle: 24/7 emergency water, fire, and mold restoration in Lombard and DuPage County. Certified technicians on-site fast with direct insurance coordination — so you get your life back sooner.
service_area_description: Serving Lombard, Addison, Villa Park, Glen Ellyn, Wheaton, Downers Grove, Elmhurst, and communities across DuPage County.
seo_title: Lombard Restoration & Cleanup | Water & Fire Restoration in Lombard, IL
seo_description: Lombard Restoration & Cleanup in Lombard, IL. 24/7 emergency water damage, fire damage, and mold restoration across DuPage County. Fast response, certified crews, insurance coordination.
services_subtitle: Water damage, fire damage, mold remediation, and storm cleanup — certified professionals available 24/7 across DuPage County.
reviews_heading: Why DuPage County Calls Us First
reviews_subtitle: Fast dispatch, honest estimates, and restoration that lasts. See what our neighbors are saying.
cta_heading: Flood in the basement? Smoke in the walls? Call now.
cta_subtitle: 24/7 emergency dispatch across DuPage County. We arrive fast, work with your insurance, and restore your property right.
footer_description: Lombard Restoration & Cleanup — 24/7 emergency water, fire, and mold restoration serving Lombard, IL and DuPage County. Certified technicians. Direct insurance billing.

services_featured.name: Water Damage Restoration
services_featured.description: Immediate water extraction, industrial drying, and full structural restoration. We stop the damage fast and handle your insurance claim so you don't have to.

services_secondary.name: Fire & Smoke Restoration
services_secondary.description: Complete fire damage recovery — soot and smoke removal, content cleaning, odor elimination, and full structural reconstruction.

services_accent.name: 24/7 Emergency Dispatch
services_accent.description: Storms and disasters don't keep business hours. Our crews are ready around the clock — call now for immediate emergency response anywhere in DuPage County.

services_wide.name: Mold Remediation
services_wide.description: Professional mold testing, containment, and removal. We trace the moisture source, eliminate the mold, and verify clean air quality before we leave.

about_features.title: 60-Minute Response Time
about_features.description: When you call, our crews are dispatched immediately. We aim to be on-site within the hour — any time, any day, anywhere in DuPage County.

about_features.title: IICRC Certified Crews
about_features.description: Every technician is certified in water damage restoration, fire restoration, and mold remediation. Industry-standard work, guaranteed.

about_features.title: Insurance Claim Assistance
about_features.description: We work directly with all major insurance carriers to document damage, file claims, and get your restoration approved fast.

reviews.name: Mike T.
reviews.text: Sump pump failed during a thunderstorm and flooded our entire basement. Lombard Restoration had a crew here at 1am and saved our finished basement. They handled the insurance claim too. Lifesavers.

reviews.name: Karen S.
reviews.text: Grease fire damaged our kitchen badly. They cleaned up the smoke, removed the odor from the whole house, and rebuilt the kitchen better than before. So grateful for their professionalism.

reviews.name: Tom W.
reviews.text: Discovered black mold behind our bathroom wall during a remodel. They contained it immediately, removed everything safely, and had the area rebuilt in less than a week. Highly recommend.
